testimonials.heading: Loved by teams worldwide

testimony1.quote: PingTO.Me has transformed how we track our marketing campaigns. The analytics are incredibly detailed and the interface is so easy to use.
testimony1.author: Sarah Chen

testimony2.quote: We switched from Bitly and haven't looked back. The custom domain support and team features are exactly what we needed.
testimony2.author: Michael Rodriguez

testimony3.quote: The QR code generator and bio pages have been game-changers for our offline marketing. Highly recommend!
testimony3.author: Emily Johnson

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Can't find what you're looking for?

q1.question: How do I get started with PingTO.Me?
q1.answer: Getting started is easy! Simply sign up for a free account, and you can start creating short links immediately. No credit card required.

q2.question: Can I use my own domain?
q2.answer: Yes! With our Pro and Enterprise plans, you can connect your own custom domain to create branded short links that build trust with your audience.

q3.question: What analytics are available?
q3.answer: We provide comprehensive analytics including click counts, geographic data, device types, browsers, referrers, and time-based trends. All in real-time.

q4.question: Is there an API available?
q4.answer: Yes, we offer a full REST API that allows you to integrate link shortening into your applications. API access is available on Pro and Enterprise plans.

q5.question: How secure are my links?
q5.answer: Security is our priority. We use enterprise-grade encryption, malicious link detection, and provide features like password protection and link expiration.

q6.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
q6.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time. No long-term contracts or hidden fees.

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Join over 50,000 marketers and creators using PingTO.Me to grow their audience.

accounts.authError: Authentication error. Please log in again.

shared.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to access this feature
shared.verifyEmailDescription: Please verify your email address to unlock all features.
shared.verifyEmailSent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
shared.twoFactorDescription: Your organization requires all members to enable two-factor authentication. Please set it up now to continue accessing your account securely.
shared.inviteRoleNote: You can only invite members with roles at or below your level.
shared.failedToInvite: Failed to invite member. Ensure user exists.

sidebar.defaultDescription: Transform long URLs into powerful short links with detailed analytics, custom domains, and QR Codes

illustration.secureDescription: Your account is protected with enterprise-grade security
illustration.almostDescription: Complete verification to unlock all features

login.sidebarDescription: Sign in to manage your links, track analytics, and grow your reach.
login.heading: Sign in to your account
login.subheading: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
login.accountLockedMessage: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again in {count} minute{plural}.
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up

twoFactor.heading: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.backupDescription: Enter your backup code to continue
twoFactor.codeDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.autoSubmit: Code will be automatically submitted when complete

register.metaDescription: Create an account to get started.
register.sidebarDescription: Create powerful short links with detailed analytics and custom branding.
register.heading: Create an account
register.subheading: Get started with your free account today
register.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
register.agreeToTerms: By clicking continue, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.
register.registrationSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordRequirements: Password must contain at least one uppercase, one lowercase, one number and one special character

forgotPassword.sidebarDescription: No worries! We will send you a secure link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.heading: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subheading: Enter your email address and we will send you a reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with that email, we have sent a password reset link.

resetPassword.sidebarDescription: Choose a strong password to keep your account secure.
resetPassword.heading: Set new password
resetPassword.successMessage: Password reset successfully! Redirecting to login...

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

verifyEmail.sidebarDescription: We're confirming your email address to keep your account secure.
verifyEmail.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address...
verifyEmail.verifiedDescription: Your email has been verified successfully. Redirecting to login...
